ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number, unique for each vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "make" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the vehicle (e.g., New, Used) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the vehicle */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Total mileage of the vehicle */,
  "drivetrain" TEXT /* Type of drivetrain (e.g., awd, fwd) */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used (e.g., Gasoline, Hybrid) */,
  "transmission" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., automatic) */,
  "engine_size" REAL /* Engine size of the vehicle in liters or cubic centimeters */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the vehicle's engine */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "trim_level" TEXT /* Trim level of the vehicle (e.g., base, premium, sport) */,
  "warranty_info" TEXT /* Warranty information for the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vin")
)

CREATE TABLE "consumer_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "vin" TEXT /* VIN of the vehicle being rated */,
  "consumer_rating" REAL /* Average consumer rating on a scale of 1 to 5 */,
  "consumer_review_count" INTEGER /* Number of consumer reviews for the vehicle */,
  "comfort_rating" REAL /* Average comfort rating on a scale of 1 to 5 */,
  "interior_design_rating" REAL /* Interior design rating on a scale of 1 to 5 */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Performance rating on a scale of 1 to 5 */,
  "value_for_money_rating" REAL /* Value for money rating on a scale of 1 to 5 */,
  "exterior_styling_rating" REAL /* Exterior styling rating on a scale of 1 to 5 */,
  "reliability_rating" REAL /* Reliability rating on a scale of 1 to 5 */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was submitted */,
  "recommends" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the consumer recommends the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consumer_ratings_vin FOREIGN KEY ("vin") REFERENCES vehicles ("vin")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "vin" TEXT /* VIN of the vehicle sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the vehicle was sold */,
  "seller_type" TEXT /* Type of seller (e.g., Dealer, Private) */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the sale occurred */,
  "dealer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dealer who sold the vehicle */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of sale (e.g., cash, finance, lease) */,
  "sale_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_vin FOREIGN KEY ("vin") REFERENCES vehicles ("vin"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_dealer_id FOREIGN KEY ("dealer_id") REFERENCES dealers ("dealer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mpg_data" (
  "mpg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MPG entry */,
  "vin" TEXT /* VIN of the vehicle for which MPG data is recorded */,
  "min_mpg" REAL /* Minimum MPG rating for the vehicle */,
  "max_mpg" REAL /* Maximum MPG rating for the vehicle */,
  "avg_mpg" REAL /* Average MPG rating for the vehicle */,
  "city_mpg" REAL /* City MPG rating for the vehicle */,
  "highway_mpg" REAL /* Highway MPG rating for the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mpg_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mpg_data_vin FOREIGN KEY ("vin") REFERENCES vehicles ("vin")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "vin" TEXT /* VIN of the vehicle in inventory */,
  "stock_number" TEXT /* Stock number of the vehicle */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity available in the inventory */,
  "inventory_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle was added to the inventory */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the vehicle in the inventory (e.g., available, sold, reserved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_vin FOREIGN KEY ("vin") REFERENCES vehicles ("vin")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "vin" TEXT /* VIN of the vehicle being reviewed */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Detailed text of the consumer review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_vin FOREIGN KEY ("vin") REFERENCES vehicles ("vin")
)

CREATE TABLE "dealers" (
  "dealer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dealer */,
  "dealer_name" TEXT /* Name of the dealer */,
  "dealer_location" TEXT /* Location of the dealer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the dealer */,
  "dealer_address" TEXT /* Address of the dealer */,
  "dealer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the dealer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dealer_id")
)
